response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or system-on-chip work despite 15+ years of software experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with proven tooling and infrastructure skills
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach through workshops and community projects
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware optimization
No evidence of deep-learning workload analysis or GPU architecture expertise
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without the required 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU performance optimization background
Web/mobile focus vs. required hardware-software co-design
